context: Tests whether the WidgetKit skill corrects Control Center toggle implementation details and remote control reloads without drifting into generic App Intents or push-notification setup.

checklist.name: Toggle action protocol
checklist.description: Requires the `ControlWidgetToggle` action to conform to `SetValueIntent` with a Boolean `value` parameter populated by the system, instead of using a parameterless `AppIntent`.

checklist.name: State persistence timing
checklist.description: Explains that the intent should apply and persist/cache the requested state before `perform()` returns so the control reload reads the correct value.

checklist.name: Control push handler signature
checklist.description: Uses `ControlPushHandler.pushTokensDidChange(controls: [ControlInfo])` and reads each configured control's push token through its optional push info.

checklist.name: Control APNs contract
checklist.description: Names the remote control reload APNs requirements: `apns-push-type: controls`, topic suffix `.push-type.controls`, and `aps.content-changed: true`.

checklist.name: Reload semantics
checklist.description: Treats remote control pushes as reload/invalidation signals that cause the value provider to fetch state, not as custom command payloads or direct intent invocations.
